# Capsa

> Developer documentation. 9 pages.

## Deploy

- [Deploy to Cloudflare](/docs/deploy/cloudflare): Publish your Capsa docs to Cloudflare Pages — free, global, and fast.

## Getting Started

- [Introduction](/docs/getting-started/introduction): Capsa is a self-hosted documentation platform — fast as in Vite, free as in libre.
- [Quickstart](/docs/getting-started/quickstart): Clone, install, run, and publish your first page in a few minutes.

## Configuration

- [Navigation](/docs/configuration/navigation): Control the sidebar and top section tabs with a single declarative config.
- [Configuration](/docs/configuration/configuration): Environment variables, theming, the API reference, and analytics.

## Guides

- [Writing Content](/docs/guides/writing-content): Frontmatter, Markdown, and the MDX components Capsa ships — callouts, code tabs, API badges, and more.
- [Theming](/docs/guides/theming): Use a built-in theme, pin one for your brand, or add your own.
- [Authentication](/docs/guides/authentication): Capsa is public by default. Gate the docs behind a login when you need to.
- [API Reference](/docs/guides/api-reference): Render an interactive API explorer from your OpenAPI spec.
